title: Sengoku Jidai + Sinytra Connector Patch
description: Let's enjoy Sengoku Jidai on Neoforge
body:
This mod is a lightweight compatibility patch for running Sengoku Jidai on NeoForge through Sinytra Connector.

The purpose of this project is to make Sengoku Jidai runnable on NeoForge.

The patch does not port or rewrite the original mod. Instead, it injects targeted fixes for problematic mixins and loader-specific API differences between Fabric and NeoForge environments that can cause crashes or initialization failures when using Sinytra Connector.


Features:

 - Targeted compatibility fixes
 - NeoForge environment injection adjustments 
 - Designed specifically for Sinytra Connector environments 
 - Minimal interference with the original mod behavior 


Important:

 - Requires Sinytra Connector
 - Requires the original Sengoku Jidai mod
 - Unofficial compatibility patch


Instructions:

- Create a NeoForge(21.1.230+) 1.21.1 profile
- Install this mod
- Install the latest available version of Sengoku Jidai for Fabric.
- Install Sinytra Connector and Forgified Fabric API
- Install:\
-- Continuity\
-- Lithostitched\
-- Polytone\
-- [EMF] Entity Model Features\
-- [ETF] Entity Texture Features

- Run the game once. If you update the patch or encounter startup issues, delete the `.connector` folder inside `mods` and launch the game again.
